escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war against Iran with Strait of Hormuz blockade, oil tanker attacks, cyberattacks on medical infrastructure, and 600,000-1 million Iranian civilians displaced.

ticker_items: Iran's new Supreme Leader vows continued Strait of Hormuz blockade
Oil prices surge over $100 as Iranian tanker attacks continue
US admits inability to control Strait of Hormuz shipping
Iranian hackers strike medical device maker Stryker globally
600,000-1 million Iranians internally displaced from ongoing conflict

middle_east.description: Iran attacked two oil tankers in the Persian Gulf as part of economic warfare strategy.
US confirmed using AI in bombardment operations against Iranian targets.
Iranian hacktivists struck medical device maker Stryker, shutting down systems globally.

middle_east.text: Tehran will keep strait of Hormuz closed and continue attacks on US assets
middle_east.speaker: Mojtaba Khamenei
middle_east.title: Supreme Leader of Iran

middle_east.text: Iran men's national soccer team is welcome to participate in the 2026 World Cup, but believes it is not appropriate that they be there for their own life and safety
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: NATO forces will strike into the heart of Russia if Moscow invades Baltic countries
middle_east.speaker: Unknown
middle_east.title: Estonia's Foreign Minister

observers.description: Estonia's Foreign Minister declared NATO forces will strike into Russia's heart if Moscow invades Baltic states. Estonia is urging allies to prepare for Russian veterans returning from Ukraine war.
Germany plans to use Ukrainian military trainers to prepare for potential war with Russia by 2029. The German army head confirmed this preparation strategy.
UAE's energy playbook is paying off amid global turmoil as energy markets enter unprecedented crisis. The country is positioning itself strategically among major producers.
French President Emmanuel Macron is leading international efforts for naval escorts to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz for oil and gas shipments.

financial.notes: Oil prices surged over $100 as Iran maintains Strait of Hormuz blockade and continues tanker attacks, with analysts comparing oil trading to meme stock volatility.

update_log.text: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei calls for continued Strait of Hormuz closure in first public statement
Iranian hacktivists strike Stryker medical device maker, causing global system shutdowns
Iran attacks two oil tankers in Persian Gulf, sending oil prices over $100
UN reports 600,000 to 1 million Iranian households internally displaced from ongoing conflict
US admits inability to control Strait of Hormuz as Iranian attacks halt oil flow
